title: The Call
author: Herman Melville
content: “I am tormented with an everlasting itch for things remote. I love to sail forbidden seas.”
action: Own your drive toward the unconventional.

title: The Vow
author: Herman Melville
content: “The path to my fixed purpose is laid with iron rails, whereon my soul is grooved to run.”

title: The Hubris
author: Herman Melville
content: “All my means are sane, my motive and my object mad.”
action: Keep your methods grounded in reality.

title: The Abyss
author: Herman Melville
content: “There is a wisdom that is woe; but there is a woe that is madness.”
action: Avoid the trap of tunnel vision.

title: The Wake
author: Herman Melville
content: “And I only am escaped alone to tell thee.”
action: Ensure your legacy survives the collapse.
